sections.paragraph: ἀσωτία, ας, ἡ [ἀ-priv., σῴζω] dissipation, as potential hazard in connection with drinking of wine Eph 5:18. μὴ ἐν ϰατηγορίᾳ ἀσωτίας not charged with dissipation Tit 1:6. In indictment of profligate society, τῆς ἀσωτίας ἀνάχυσις stream of dissipation 1 Pt 4:4, w. connotation of debauchery.
